name: instagram-mirror
description: Follow public Instagram profiles and mirror their posts locally. Uses yt-dlp first, falls back to gallery-dl for stubborn profiles.

envVars.name: PHOTOS_ROOT
envVars.description: Host directory where Instagram media is cached per-profile

envVars.name: IG_COOKIES_PATH
envVars.description: Optional path to a cookies.txt for accessing private profiles you follow

envVars.name: SYNC_TOKEN
envVars.description: Shared secret for the daily sync cron

postInstall: 1. Install yt-dlp AND gallery-dl on the host (or in the container)
3. Mount a host volume at PHOTOS_ROOT
4. Optional: provide IG_COOKIES_PATH if you follow private accounts (export cookies.txt from your browser)
5. Add profiles via /instagram/manage, then trigger sync
